case_title: LUCKENBACH, CAROL VS DWIRI, NATHAN AGENT FOR SERVICE et al

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL OF PLTF'S CLAIM SENT TO NATHAN DWIRI RETURNED--REFUSED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCKENBACH, CAROL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE NATHAN DWIRI IS DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-06-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-25-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PLTF TO SUBPOENA DEFT'S AGENT FRANK LOPEZ WHO PLTF CLAIMS INSTRUCTED HER TO FILE LAWSUIT 1 DAY LATE, THE MONDAY AFTER WEEKEND.
